goal: Close key engineering gaps: remove dual-entry ambiguity in docs, add explicit project license, establish runnable test baseline, and declare required Node.js version.
constraints: Do not modify gameplay runtime behavior in this task.
Keep documentation aligned with single active source directory (src/).
Use lightweight test baseline without introducing heavy new dependencies.
deliverables: README updated with clear single-entry structure and environment/testing guidance.
Node version requirement documented and machine-readable.
At least one runnable automated test under tests/ with npm script entry.
